stemHtml:
Given the following information, where does the HSI course deviation bar appear?

Heading: 160°
VOR radial: 240°
Selected course: 250°

options.a: Behind the aeroplane symbol with the FROM flag showing.
options.b: Ahead of the aeroplane symbol with the FROM flag showing.
options.c: Behind the aeroplane symbol with the TO flag showing.
options.d: Ahead of the aeroplane symbol with the TO flag showing.
